news.headline: V&V Supremo Foods, Inc. certified as a Great Place to Work® based on employee feedback. 83% rate it positively.
news.summary: In Chicago, on February 28, 2025, V&V Supremo Foods, Inc. announced their certification as a Great Place To Work®. This recognition is determined by feedback from current employees on their work experience with the company. Impressively, this year, 83% of employees reported that V&V Supremo Foods, Inc. is a fantastic place to work.

news.headline: Trump tells Zelenskiy his comments were very disrespectful.
Trump, Zelenskiy, and US VP Vance argue in the oval office.
Enzymatica AB to host digital press briefing on March 5, 2025, presenting results from 2 studies on ColdZyme. Time: 13:00–14:10.
news.summary: Enzymatica AB is hosting a digital press briefing on March 5, 2025, to discuss the results of two separate research studies on ColdZyme. The event will take place from 13:00 to 14:10. During the briefing, researchers involved in the studies will present their findings and be open for discussion.

news.headline: Kraton Corporation increases global prices by up to 25% on turpentine refined products, effective immediately.
news.summary: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas called Kraton Corporation, specializing in sustainable specialty polymers and high-value bio-based products from pine wood pulping co-products, has declared a general price surge of as much as 25% on Turpentine refined items. This development was announced on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Trump to Zelenskiy: You either make a deal, or we are out.
Aracion partners with Keysight to enhance CATR FR1 OTA testing capabilities in UK, India, UAE, Singapore, China, and the U.S.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 28, 2025, Aracion, an internationally recognized test lab operating in multiple countries including the UK, India, UAE, Singapore, China, and the U.S., revealed a significant partnership with Keysight Technologies. The aim of this collaboration is to implement CATR FR1 OTA testing capabilities, subsequently enhancing their services.

news.headline: Trump: It is going to be very hard to do business like this.
Flex LNG filed its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with SEC as of Dec 31, 2024. Announcement made on Feb 28, 2025 in Bermuda via PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Bermuda's Hamilton on February 28, 2025, Flex LNG Ltd disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report contains essential data related to the Company's financial performance and operations during the specified period.

news.headline: Sunset World Group in Cancun launched permanent campaign in Feb to combat scams targeting its members and guests.
news.summary: In early February 2025, Sunset World Group unveiled a new ongoing initiative in Cancun, Mexico to tackle scams, particularly targeting its members and visitors. The group is actively sharing updated details on fraudulent schemes through its website and various communication channels.

news.headline: Trump to Zelenskiy: You are gambling with World War III. You don't have the cards right now.
Nutrien Ltd. has filed its 2024 Annual Report (TSX and NYSE: NTR), available on SEC and SEDAR websites.
news.summary: Nutrien Ltd. has disclosed its 2024 Annual Report, MD&A, and Audited Financial Statements, along with its Annual Information Form, for public access. These documents are now accessible on the US SEC's EDGAR website (www.sec.gov) and the Canadian Securities Administrators' website (www.sedarplus.ca). Investors and stakeholders can review and download the 2024 Annual Report from these sources. Nutrien Ltd. is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol NTR.

news.headline: CUPE Ontario vows to resist Ford's agenda, representing 290,000 public sector workers, despite his failed election bid.
news.summary: In Toronto, Doug Ford strategically took advantage of a time of national and global chaos to regain power for the Conservatives in Ontario. Despite his opportunistic actions, Ford did not secure the significantly larger majority he had claimed as justification for the expensive and unwarranted election. CUPE Ontario, representing 290,000 public sector employees in the province, highlighted Ford's shortcomings, suggesting that this outcome will strengthen their resolve to resist the Conservatives' controversial policies.

news.headline: Stocks saw a 'Trump Bump' after his win, but the rally faded in February. S&P 500 on course for worst week of 2019.
news.summary: Following President Trump's victory, stocks experienced a significant surge, but this trend largely shifted in February. By Friday, the S&P 500 was headed for its most challenging week of the year, signifying a notable downturn in market performance.

news.headline: GU announces "UG" clothing line with UNDERCOVER, launching March 14, 2025. Aimed to enhance fashion offerings.
news.summary: Set to be released on Friday, March 14, 2025, in New York City, GU, a brand under Fast Retailing Group and sister brand of UNIQLO, has revealed the introduction of "UG", a fresh clothing line developed in collaboration with UNDERCOVER. The anticipated launch of "UG" is scheduled for March 14, 2025, marking a significant stride forward in the fashion world.

news.headline: Trump: I’m not aligned with Putin; I'm aligned with the US and the good of the world.
4106 PR, LLC buys Point Royale Apartments in Victoria, TX for $11.4M on Feb. 27, 2025.
news.summary: 4106 PR, LLC has recently purchased Point Royale Apartments in Victoria, Texas for $11.4 million. The multi-family residential community is situated at 4106 John Stockbauer Drive and the acquisition was completed on February 27, 2025.

news.headline: Phase 1 Epstein Files reveal disappointments as flight logs and contact list release by AG falls short of expectations.
news.summary: The attorney general's release of flight logs and Jeffrey Epstein's contact list drew criticism from individuals anticipating them to unveil fresh details, with the new information failing to meet these expectations.

news.headline: Trump: There is not an agreement from Ukraine to purchase US LNG.
Democrats: Republicans want to enshrine Trump, musk cuts in US government funding bill, while Democrats want Congress to decide funding.
Global news app market grows at 17.7% CAGR, valued at USD 11.46B in 2023, projected to reach USD 36.32B.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of February 28, 2025, the News Application Market has been categorized into types such as Android, iOS, and Web App, and applications including Subscription Service and Advertisement. The market was valued at USD 11,460 million in 2023, with projections indicating potential growth to reach USD 36,320 million.

news.headline: Top Democrats on Appropriations Committees: Republicans have walked away from US govt. funding talks, raising risk of shutdown - Statement.
Trump: I spoke with Putin a couple days ago.
Solana bounces back with CME Group launching futures due to rising demand, while other assets fall on Friday. #crypto
news.summary: While most digital assets were falling on Friday, Solana's value was increasing.

news.headline: Russian-sanctions bring attention from investors as potential relief is considered, economic indicators show positive trends.
Roundtrip and Call the Car team up to enhance Medicaid transportation for Southern California members.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on February 28, 2025, Roundtrip, a prominent provider of streamlined medical transportation, teamed up with Call the Car, a reputable intermediary for non-emergency medical transport. This collaboration aims to enhance transport services for Medicaid beneficiaries in Southern California.

news.headline: Newmark to attend Citi's 30th Annual Global Property CEO Conference. Barry Gosin to represent company.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Newmark Group, Inc. revealed in a press release that Barry Gosin will be taking on a new role within the company. Newmark, listed on Nasdaq as NMRK, is a prominent player in the commercial real estate sector, offering advisory and services to major institutional investors, global corporations, and property owners. This development underscores the company's commitment to enhancing its leadership structure and adapting to industry demands.

news.headline: Luda Technology Group Ltd closes IPO, sells 2.5M shares at $4/share, raising $10M in gross proceeds.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Luda Technology Group Limited, a prominent manufacturer and trader of stainless steel and carbon steel flanges and fittings products with over 20 years of operational experience, disclosed the completion of its initial public offering. The offering consisted of 2,500,000 Ordinary Shares priced at $4.00 per share, totaling US$10.0 million in gross proceeds to the Company before underwriting discounts and offering expenses. All shares in the Offering were provided by the Company.

news.headline: Family Heirloom Storage opens 96,000 sq ft facility in Chattanooga, TN due to high demand. #FHS #Expansion #Chattanooga #Storage
news.summary: Responding to high market demand, the rapidly expanding self storage company, Family Heirloom Storage (FHS), has recently introduced a new multi-service storage facility in Ft. Myers, Florida. The facility spans an impressive 96,000 square feet, catering to both corporate and consumer clients. This move comes as FHS continues to solidify its position as a leading player in the industry. This development was announced on February 28, 2025, and further information can be found on the company's website at familyheirloomstorage.com.

news.headline: Azzaro names Sebastián Yatra as new fragrance ambassador for Forever Wanted Elixir campaign. Bold and ambitious scent.
news.summary: A new olfactory journey begins with Azzaro Wanted's Forever Wanted Elixir, released in Paris on Feb. 28, 2025. This fragrance aims to capture audacity and ambition, inviting the senses to a captivating experience. Intended to command attention, this scent is set to leave a lasting impression with its unique blend and bold design.

news.headline: Trump: I am for both Ukraine and Russia.
Trump: I am committed to NATO too, Europe and NATO have to step up.
Trump: I am very committed to Poland.
Dr. Assassa provides solutions for "Ozempic® Face" with non-surgical treatments like dermal fillers for facial volume loss.
news.summary: The increasing popularity of weight-loss drugs such as Ozempic® and Wegovy® has led to a growing number of patients facing facial volume loss, referred to as "Ozempic® Face." Dr. Sam Assassa from Beverly Hills Aesthetics provides alternative non-surgical solutions, like dermal fillers, to address this issue.

news.headline: Aristocrat Gaming wins "Best Overall Supplier of Slot Content" at EKG Slot Awards for 7th year; King Max™ top new cabinet.
news.summary: At the 2025 Eilers & Krejcik (EKG) Slot Awards in Las Vegas on February 28, 2025, Aristocrat Gaming was recognized as the "Best Overall Supplier of Slot Content" for the seventh year in a row. Additionally, their product King Max™ was named the top performing new premium cabinet. This marks another successful year for Aristocrat Gaming in the industry, solidifying their reputation as a leading provider of slot content.

news.headline: Cyberlux Corp secures Phase Two deal worth over $1M, bringing total to $2.5M in Datron presence in Asia-Pacific market.
news.summary: In North Carolina's Research Triangle Park, Cyberlux Corporation (OTC: CYBL) recently disclosed a significant update. The company, known for its expertise in advanced defense technology and tactical communications solutions, proudly confirmed the completion of Phase One of its substantial Datron order intended for the Asia-Pacific market. This noteworthy achievement signifies Datron's ongoing growth in the region and points towards increasing interest in Datron’s high-power HF communication systems. The order, now transitioning into the shipping phase, marks a crucial step for Cyberlux as it solidifies its presence and operations. This development showcases the promising trajectory and market traction both Cyberlux and Datron are experiencing in response to the rising demand for their innovative solutions.

news.headline: 2024's annual report released covering January to December period.
Fed's Goolsbee: It is a tough position for the Fed if anticipation exceeds reality.
Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: This document is a good start but not enough.
DÉKUPLE sees steady growth in business, increases European expansion efforts in 2024. #growth #Europe #expansion
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 5.2%, the lowest it has been in the last ten years. This decrease is attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. The report also highlights a significant increase in average hourly wages by 3.5% compared to the previous year. Additionally, the labor force participation rate has risen to 63.8%, the highest recorded in the past five years. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are indicative of a strong and growing job market.

news.headline: Six coherent products have been recognized for excellence in optical networking by Lightwave + BTR Innovation Reviews.
news.summary: Six innovative products have been honored by Lightwave + BTR Innovation Reviews for their exceptional performance in optical networking. These outstanding products have been recognized for their coherence and received prestigious awards.

Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: Ukraine has a big need for air defense.

Trump: Once the deal is done, it's over. Russia won't want to return.
Akropolis Group's Green Finance Framework boosts sustainability with financing options for eco-friendly projects.
news.summary: Akropolis Group recently introduced a Green Finance Framework aimed at enhancing the alignment between the company's sustainability goals and its financial endeavors. This framework enables the financing or refinancing of projects that adhere to its sustainability criteria, such as green buildings, using a range of Green Finance Instruments. This initiative marks a significant step towards promoting environmentally-friendly projects within the company's financial operations.
